headline: Earn $5,000+ Yearly With These 4 Dividend Stocks
summary: Earned income has a ceiling. Hours in a day, headcount budgets, layoff cycles, and corporate restructurings all cap how much a paycheck can deliver. Passive income flips that dynamic. A properly built dividend portfolio pays you on a schedule independent of whether you showed up to work or whether your employer hit its quarter. Real ... Earn $5,000+ Yearly With These 4 Dividend Stocks

headline: The Dividend Strategy That Beats the 4% Rule by $400,000 Over 20 Years on a $1 Million Portfolio
summary: A 65-year-old retiree with $1 million who follows the standard 4% rule withdraws $40,000 in the first year, then increases that amount over time to keep pace with inflation. A dividend-focused alternative starts slightly lower, at about $38,000 in annual income from a 3.8% blended yield, but does not require selling shares. Over 20 years, ... The Dividend Strategy That Beats the 4% Rule by $400,000 Over 20 Years on a $1 Million Portfolio

headline: AST Rises. Space Stocks Are Volatile Ahead of the SpaceX IPO.
summary: Case in point:  AST SpaceMobile  Shares were up 1.4% in early trading Tuesday, while the  was down 0.3%.  An announcement by the company that three of its communications satellites were slated to head to the stars on June 17, aboard a  SpaceX  rocket, seems to have catalyzed the gains.  AST is building a communications satellite constellation that will be used by  Verizon Communications AT&T  and others to improve wireless service on Earth.

headline: US operators move the goalposts to better frame account and convergence growth
summary: Real, sustainable, long-term growth is decidedly hard to come by these days, and there’s no clearer sign of how unforgiving the US services space has become than the big three nationwide telcos all deciding to overhaul their reporting structures for Q1 2026.

headline: Get Paid Like an Indiana Police Officer With $5,000 a Month in Dividend Income After Taxes
summary: Five thousand dollars a month in spendable dividend income works out to $60,000 per year after federal tax, roughly equivalent to the salary of a typical police officer in Indiana. The headline yield shown on a brokerage statement does not tell the full story. Taxes, the type of distributions received, and future dividend growth all ... headline: Verizon, AT&T suffer major customer data setback
summary: Phone companies can collect some of the most sensitive information about their customers, such as their locations. That happens because cellphones repeatedly connect to nearby cell towers as they operate. The Supreme Court noted that each connection can register a phone’s location, giving ...
